query: List all audiences used by live journeys with 'loyalty' in the journey name.

trace.sql: SELECT s.SEGMENTID AS audience_id, s.NAME AS audience_name, t.TARGETID AS target_id, t.NAME AS target_name, t.STATE AS target_state FROM dim_segment s JOIN hkg_br_segment_target st ON s.SEGMENTID = st.SEGMENTID JOIN dim_target t ON st.TARGETID = t.TARGETID WHERE (LOWER(t.NAME) LIKE '%loyalty%' OR LOWER(t.DATAFLOWNAME) LIKE '%loyalty%') AND LOWER(t.STATE) = 'live'
